description:
Weekly Monday 8 AM PHT cron. Emails the HR Recruitment Manager group
a KPI digest covering: star leakage (priority-3 applicants not
contacted within 24h), overall pass rate, assessment drop-off rate,
and source ROI breakdown for the trailing 7 days.

Refactored from the original alert_weekly_kpi_digest.py: removed the
sorted(..., key=lambda) and tuple-comprehension closure risks by
using plain tuple-sort and explicit for-loop append.
